opportunities.name: AI day planner and task decomposer
opportunities.pricingSignal: $17-$29/month for common premium plans
opportunities.wedge: Local Calendar and Reminders planning with deterministic scheduling and optional on-device AI

opportunities.name: Read-it-later and knowledge inbox
opportunities.pricingSignal: Readwise Reader is about $9.99/month billed annually and has no permanent free tier
opportunities.wedge: Local library, source-linked summaries, App Intent capture, and open Markdown/JSON export

opportunities.name: Private voice notes and transcription
opportunities.pricingSignal: Otter and Notta commonly charge roughly $8-$17/month for individual premium plans
opportunities.wedge: On-device-first capture, private archive, structured action extraction, and pay-only-for-cloud-minutes fallback

opportunities.name: Private personal relationship manager
opportunities.pricingSignal: Dex starts around $12/month and deeper plans reach about $20/month
opportunities.wedge: Local Contacts and Calendar timeline with private briefs and voice interaction logging

opportunities.name: Private journal and reflection coach
opportunities.pricingSignal: Day One publishes $49.99/year and $74.99/year tiers, with AI concentrated in the higher tier
opportunities.wedge: Encrypted local journals, user-owned export, and on-device reflection without training on entries

opportunities.name: Smart document and receipt scanner
opportunities.pricingSignal: Common premium scanner plans start around $4.99-$7.99/month
opportunities.wedge: VisionKit capture, local OCR, structured fields, and open CSV/JSON/PDF export

opportunities.name: Source-linked study deck and exam coach
opportunities.pricingSignal: Quizlet paid plans are roughly $35.99-$44.99/year with usage limits in lower tiers
opportunities.wedge: Local decks, cited card generation, spaced repetition, and Anki/CSV export

opportunities.name: Transparent adaptive workout planner
opportunities.pricingSignal: Fitbod is publicly listed around $15.99/month or $95.99/year
opportunities.wedge: Free logging, explainable progression rules, equipment-aware plans, and HealthKit integration

opportunities.name: Confidence-aware plant identification and care
opportunities.pricingSignal: PictureThis commonly lists a $39.99/year in-app purchase
opportunities.wedge: Free care tracking and reminders with evidence-backed identification and visible uncertainty

opportunities.name: Voice-first food logger and meal planner
opportunities.pricingSignal: MyFitnessPal publishes $79.99/year and $99.99/year premium tiers
opportunities.wedge: USDA-backed data, reusable meals, local history, voice capture, and optional paid vision credits

opportunities.name: Private subscription and renewal tracker
opportunities.pricingSignal: Rocket Money reserves cancellation and advanced tracking for Premium
opportunities.wedge: Local receipt/email parsing, manual confirmation, renewal calendar, and no bank login requirement for the core workflow

opportunities.name: Offline trip and reservation organizer
opportunities.pricingSignal: Wanderlog Pro starts around $39.99/year
opportunities.wedge: Local itinerary, share-sheet capture, offline maps cache, and source-linked AI suggestions

opportunities.name: Home inventory and warranty memory
opportunities.pricingSignal: Sortly business-oriented paid plans start around $24/month on annual promotions
opportunities.wedge: Photo-first local catalog, receipt OCR, warranty reminders, and insurance-ready export

opportunities.name: Local sleep debt and energy planner
opportunities.pricingSignal: RISE commonly lists annual purchases around $59.99-$69.99 and no permanent free plan
opportunities.wedge: HealthKit-first trend calculation, transparent sleep debt model, and calendar-aware energy planning

opportunities.name: Private family calendar and household operations
opportunities.pricingSignal: Cozi lists $39/year Gold and $79/year AI Max
opportunities.wedge: Shared household routines, local-first family data, event extraction, meal and chore planning

opportunities.name: Freelancer time and invoice assistant
opportunities.pricingSignal: Timely starts around $11/month and higher tiers reach $20-$28/month
opportunities.wedge: Local activity capture, transparent time suggestions, invoice export, and no team SaaS overhead

opportunities.name: Affordable language speaking coach
opportunities.pricingSignal: ELSA lists plans around $89.99/year
opportunities.wedge: Short daily role-play, local vocabulary memory, transparent pronunciation feedback, and metered AI voice sessions

opportunities.name: Accessible text-to-speech reading workspace
opportunities.pricingSignal: Speechify Premium is commonly listed around $139/year
opportunities.wedge: System voices, document OCR, reading focus modes, local highlights, and optional premium voices by credit

opportunities.name: Private medication reminder and care log
opportunities.pricingSignal: Medication apps often gate unlimited medicines, reports, or interaction tools behind annual subscriptions
opportunities.wedge: Safety-critical reminders remain free, local records, caregiver export, and explicit non-diagnostic boundaries

opportunities.name: Pantry-aware meal and grocery planner
opportunities.pricingSignal: Mealime Pro is around $2.99/month while larger nutrition suites cost substantially more
opportunities.wedge: Local pantry, waste reduction, shared grocery list, recipe import, and budget-constrained generation

opportunities.name: Explainable photo cleanup and curation
opportunities.pricingSignal: Photo cleanup utilities frequently use weekly or annual subscriptions for duplicate detection
opportunities.wedge: Local Photos analysis, reversible review queues, explainable similarity, and no cloud upload

opportunities.name: Adaptive focus sound and routine engine
opportunities.pricingSignal: Adaptive sound apps commonly charge recurring annual subscriptions
opportunities.wedge: Procedural local sound, calendar-aware sessions, no streaming dependency, and reusable focus routines

opportunities.name: Shared pet care and health timeline
opportunities.pricingSignal: Pet care apps fragment reminders, records, and household collaboration across premium tiers
opportunities.wedge: Local pet timeline, household assignments, document scan, feeding and medication reminders

opportunities.name: Private wardrobe and outfit memory
opportunities.pricingSignal: Wardrobe apps often trade free access for ads, subscriptions, or closed catalogs
opportunities.wedge: Local garment segmentation, wear-cost tracking, weather-aware suggestions, and open export
